problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
